mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_ghs WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_ghs WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_ghs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_ghs WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_ghs ( chemical_name, cas_number, physical_hazard, health_hazard, environmental_hazard, signal_word, ghs_version, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{physicalHazard}, #{healthHazard}, #{environmentalHazard}, #{signalWord}, #{ghsVersion}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_ghs SET chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, physical_hazard = #{physicalHazard}, health_hazard = #{healthHazard}, environmental_hazard = #{environmentalHazard}, signal_word = #{signalWord}, ghs_version = #{ghsVersion}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_ghs SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
